hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/OS'); import eos_ai" 2>&1 | grep -E 'Error|error' | head -3 || echo '[Hook] imports: clean'

python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/OS'); from eos_ai.session_state import SessionState; SessionState.update_progress(last_completed='pre-compact save', in_progress='active session')" 2>/dev/null && echo '[Hook] State saved before compact'
